name: securepay-ai-reviewer
description: Financial AI code review copilot for payment, privacy, security, API stability, and production readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Financial AI Code Review Copilot for payment services.
interface.longDescription: SecurePay AI Reviewer packages Codex skill instructions and a deterministic Python rule engine so financial engineers can review security, privacy, API stability, testing, and deployment risk before a payment-service change ships.
